pi_items.source: O*NET Online official occupation code database

Web search confirms Compliance Officers (13-1041) work extensively in insurance industry with focus on NAIC Model Audit Rule compliance; Compliance Officers are Business and Financial Operations occupations

Web search for 'Meridian Life Insurance Group' $4.2B returned results for other Meridian insurance entities but not the specific organization described. The organization is not found in public insurance databases or regulatory filings.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves role-play as a Chief Compliance Officer at a fictional insurance organization (Meridian Life Insurance Group, which does not appear to be a real entity). The occupation code 13-1041.00 correctly corresponds to Compliance Officers, which is an appropriate ONET classification for the Insurance and Financial Services industry. The task uses real Eramba GRC software (open-source governance and compliance platform) but operates with synthetically-generated data - all policies, IT assets, exceptions, and projects are created within the simulated environment and do not represent real insurance company compliance records. The NAIC Model Audit Rule and related regulatory frameworks referenced are real compliance requirements in the insurance industry.
